hero.badge: Powered by AI · Real Market Data from Uzbekistan
hero.title: Find Your Perfect IT Career
hero.subtitle: Make data-driven career decisions with real market insights from Uzbekistan. Discover your skills, find your path, and land your dream job.
features.title: Everything You Need to Launch Your IT Career
features.subtitle: Our platform combines AI intelligence with real market data to guide you from beginner to professional.
features.aiMatching.title: AI-Powered Career Matching
features.aiMatching.desc: Take our 5-minute assessment and get personalized role recommendations based on your skills and interests.
features.marketData.title: Real-Time Market Data
features.marketData.desc: Access live job openings, salary insights, and trending skills across the Uzbekistan IT market.
features.roadmap.title: Personalized Learning Roadmap
features.roadmap.desc: Get AI-generated skill gap analysis and step-by-step learning plans tailored to your career goals.
features.cv.title: Professional CV Generation
features.cv.desc: Build polished CVs with multiple templates, auto-populated from your profile and achievements.
howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From assessment to career launch in six simple steps
howItWorks.step1.title: Take Assessment or Upload CV
howItWorks.step1.desc: Complete a quick 5-minute career assessment or upload your existing CV.
howItWorks.step2.title: Get Career Recommendations
howItWorks.step2.desc: Receive AI-powered career path suggestions based on your profile.
howItWorks.step3.title: Analyze Your Skill Gaps
howItWorks.step3.desc: See which skills you need to learn for your target role.
howItWorks.step4.title: Follow Personalized Roadmap
howItWorks.step4.desc: Get a step-by-step learning plan with curated resources.
howItWorks.step5.title: Track Your Progress
howItWorks.step5.desc: Monitor your learning journey and skill development over time.
howItWorks.step6.title: Create Your CV
howItWorks.step6.desc: Generate a professional CV showcasing your new skills and projects.
cta.title: Not sure which IT field is right for you?
cta.subtitle: You don't need to figure it out alone. Our AI-powered quiz analyzes your interests, strengths, and goals to recommend the best career path for you — whether it's frontend, backend, data science, or something else entirely.
cta.benefit1.title: Personalized Recommendations
cta.benefit1.desc: Get role suggestions matched to your unique interests and aptitudes, not generic advice.
cta.benefit2.title: Course & Learning Path
cta.benefit2.desc: After the quiz, get a step-by-step learning roadmap with free resources to start right away.
cta.benefit3.title: Powered by AI
cta.benefit3.desc: Our AI analyzes real market data from Uzbekistan to give you relevant, up-to-date career advice.
footer.description: AI-powered career guidance platform helping IT newcomers in Uzbekistan make data-driven career decisions with real market insights.
settings.themeSub: Customize the look and feel of SkillBridge
